title: tragacantha glaux
intro: Tragacantha glaux, also known as Vavilovia or Globe Mallow, is a rare and endangered flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting against free radicals, and exhibiting antimicrobial activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
